title: rhododendron atlanticum f. luteoalbum
intro: Rhododendron atlanticum f. luteoalbum, a variety of the Atlantic rhododendron, is a flowering plant that is a pale yellow form of Rhododendron atlanticum. The medicinal properties of Rhododendron atlanticum f. luteoalbum are derived from its flowers and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron atlanticum f. luteoalbum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
